issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling for missing environment variables or dependencies.

scenarios.name: Dev pretty-print vs prod JSON with base context
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows pino-pretty but misses formatters.level and conditional transport; treatment configures transport, base, and formatters.level exactly as the skill prescribes.

scenarios.name: Express request logging with status-based levels
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for morgan or hand-rolled middleware; treatment uses pino-http with customLogLevel, serializers, and child loggers for requestId propagation per the skill.
